items.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
items.overview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to

items.title: The End of Oak Street
items.overview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

items.title: La La Land
items.overview: Mia, an aspiring actress, serves lattes to movie stars in between auditions and Sebastian, a jazz musician, scrapes by playing cocktail party gigs in dingy bars, but as success mounts they are faced with decisions that begin to fray the fragile fabric of their love affair, and the dreams they worked

items.title: Train to Busan
items.overview: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival.

items.title: Ice Cream Man
items.overview: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

items.title: PAW Patrol: The Dino Movie
items.overview: The Paw Patrol lands on a mysterious dinosaur island after a storm, where they meet Rex, a stranded pup. When Humdinger's reckless mining triggers a volcano, the team faces their biggest rescue mission yet to save the island.

items.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
items.overview: When eccentric candy man Willy Wonka promises a lifetime supply of sweets and a tour of his chocolate factory to five lucky kids, penniless Charlie Bucket seeks the golden ticket that will make him a winner.

items.title: Toxic
items.overview: As Portuguese rule crumbles in Goa, Raya rises through betrayal and bloodshed to claim the city’s underworld, only to learn that power always demands a price.

items.title: I Want Your Sex
items.overview: When fresh-faced Elliot lands an exciting job for renowned artist, icon and provocateur Erika Tracy, his fantasies come true as Erika taps him to become her sexual muse. But Elliot soon finds himself out of his depth as Erika takes him on a journey more profound than he ever could have imagined, int

items.title: One Night Only
items.overview: Two love-starved strangers crash into each other on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

items.title: The Brink of War
items.overview: President Ronald Reagan races against time to salvage a deal with Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev that could dismantle nuclear arsenals—or ignite disaster. With pressure mounting on all sides, every word spoken brings the world closer to peace... or destruction.

items.title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
items.overview: After years of slapdash sequels and waning fandom, the Camp Miasma slasher franchise is handed over to an enthusiastic young director for resurrection. But when she visits the original's star, a now-reclusive actress shrouded in mystery, the two women fall into a blood-soaked world of desire, fear,

items.title: Elijah Peel
items.overview: A stadium-filling rock star, Elijah Peel is at the top of the world … until his addiction leads to a heart attack that could cost him everything. During his recovery, Elijah encounters a remarkable young girl whose unwavering faith, radiant spirit, and wisdom beyond her years begin to break through

items.title: The Samurai and the Prisoner
items.overview: When Lord Murashige rises up against the tyrannical Oda, he finds himself besieged within the walls of his own castle. Isolated, he is confronted with a series of mysterious crimes that shatter the fragile order of his court, plunging the fortress into fear and suspicion. With Oda's army closing in

items.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS
items.overview: This celebrates the group's new era and the fans who made it possible. Features exclusive behind-the-scenes footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews with the members.

items.title: Nimrods
items.overview: Three friends journey from Kansas City to Los Angeles, mistakenly believing that their band is opening for Green Day on New Year’s Eve.

items.title: Wet Hot American Summer
items.overview: It's the last day of Camp Firewood's season, but there's still time for the big talent show, a little romance… and for everyone to be wiped out by the piece of NASA's Skylab that's hurtling toward Earth.

items.title: Super Troopers 3
items.overview: When Farva’s wildly over-the-top Indian engagement to Thorny’s sister spirals into chaos, the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny’s schemes to break up the relationship, while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring  — all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself.

items.title: The Gentleman Thief
items.overview: A retired master thief is forced to protect his reckless brother from harm when a daring yacht heist worth 100 million dollars culminates in a complex and dangerous web of intrigue and deceit. As tensions mount and old enemies from the past resurface, he faces a life-or-death struggle. To survive, h

items.title: Fast
items.overview: For Sterling, a sort of present-day Alice, the graveyard Lotus she redeems becomes a totem, a saturated phenomenon permitting her to move freely in time on a phantom road. It is a sort of Ford but never a DeLorean. A Southern woman with a fair deal of historical baggage and deep secrets, Sterling jo

items.title: Epitaph
items.overview: Newlywed Anna and her husband relocate to Alaska, but their blissful life takes a dark turn when a car crash causes Anna to develop selective amnesia. The incident triggers agoraphobia and haunting flashbacks.

items.title: Tony
items.overview: A 19-year-old Anthony Bourdain travels to Provincetown and stumbles into the chaotic world of a restaurant kitchen, setting off a summer that will shape the course of his life.

items.title: Cookie Queens
items.overview: A celebration of girlhood and the complexities that come with it, Cookie Queens is a coming-of-age story about the joys, pressures, and tensions woven into one of America’s most cherished rituals: Girl Scout Cookie season.

items.title: Infernal
items.overview: Infernal follows Azrael, a young man bound to forces beyond his control as rival powers close in around him. His journey in search of his wife is tests his loyalty and betrayal ignites a struggle that will decide the world’s fate.

items.title: The Wrong Girls
items.overview: Two codependent best friends living paycheck to paycheck and bong rip to bong rip get caught in a case of mistaken identity that throws their lives into chaos.

items.title: The Rivals of Amziah King
items.overview: Amziah King, beekeeper, musician, and anchor of his community, reunites with former foster daughter Kateri after many years apart, and fends off threats to his honey business.

items.title: Potato Salad
items.overview: On Christmas Eve, a detective receives a call about a suicide that occurred during a dinner. When he arrives at the scene, he quickly realizes that something isn’t right and what appears to be a suicide may actually be something far more sinister.

items.title: Falcons
items.overview: Andy is trained by his ex-hitman father to infiltrate Hell's Cartel, but when his sister is kidnapped and betrayal hits, the plan unravels, sparking the H-Game, turning child violence into global control.

items.title: Transylvania Tapes
items.overview: In 1997, Romanian actress Silvia Enescu mysteriously disappeared while searching for family property in Transylvania. All she left behind were a collection of home movies: the TRANSYLVANIA TAPES. Now, Silvia's daughter Mara travels from Los Angeles to Romania to discover what happened to her mother.

items.title: The Lift
items.overview: The world's first film shot entirely inside an elevator, from the brilliant mind of Sexocracy author Luca Redavid. Bologna, August 2, 1980. A terrifying roar shakes the central station, while six strangers remain trapped in a cabin just steps from hell. Isolated from the world in a claustrophobic sp

items.title: Vestige
items.overview: When a hooded figure steps into an abandoned house deep in the woods, flickering lights awaken memories of the family who once called it home.

items.title: Above & Below
items.overview: A group of friends set off for an unforgettable vacation. What begins as an adventure of partying and diving quickly turns into a nightmare when they are attacked by criminals in open waters.

items.title: Holy Father
items.overview: A horror thriller from the makers of 'Holy Ghost'

items.title: The Birthday Party
items.overview: The late 1970s, somewhere in the Mediterranean: Marcos Timoleon, a tycoon, is throwing a lavish, extravagant birthday party for Sofia on his exclusive private island. The party is a perfect excuse for various people in his life to approach him with their own agendas.

items.title: Late Fame
items.overview: Legendary New York poet Ed Saxberger's forgotten works captivate an eccentric group of young creatives, reigniting his artistic passion. Their intrigue intertwines with the bewitching presence of actress Gloria.

items.title: THE RIBBON HERO
items.overview: The story of Sapphire as she overcomes loss and trauma to protect those she holds dear.

items.title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes: Organic Intelligence
items.overview: "Jurassic Park" meets "Dr. Strangelove". It's a reprise and fifth feature spin of the 1978 Cult Classic "Attack of the Killer Tomatoes," the franchise that went from 80s midnight screenings to help launch the Fox Children's TV Network.

items.title: Union County
items.overview: Assigned to a county-mandated drug court program, Cody Parsons embarks on the tenuous journey toward recovery amid the opioid epidemic in rural Ohio.

items.title: ForeFans
items.overview: A naive international student struggling to make ends meet decides to try webcam modeling to support herself financially. But within the lurid online world where every body is treated as a commodity, what will the ultimate price be?
